web.title: Baykar Bayraktar Kizilelma Unmanned Combat Aerial Vehicle (UCAV)
web.description: The Baykar Bayraktar Kizilelma is a planned UCAV originating from the nation of Turkey and intended primarily for its armed forces.

web.title: ZAO ENIX Eleron-3 (Aileron-3) - Military Factory
web.description: The ZAO ENIX Eleron-3 is a short-ranged Unmanned Aerial Vehicle charged with local surveillance and reconnaissance for operating ground troops.
